# <Concise Feature Title>

## Summary

Provide a high-level summary of the feature:

- What was implemented
- Why it was needed
- What problem it solves

Focus on the feature as a whole, not individual implementation steps.

---

## Key Changes

Summarize the most important changes:

- Major functionality introduced
- Key integration points
- Behavioral changes

Avoid low-level or overly technical details unless necessary.

---

## Design Notes

Highlight important design considerations:

- Architectural decisions
- Trade-offs made
- Alignment with existing system patterns

---

## 📚 References (If Applicable)

Include links to relevant documentation:

- ADRs → `docs/adr`
- Design Docs → `docs/design`

Examples:
- `docs/adr/adr-012-session-management.md`
- `docs/design/workspace-lifecycle.md`

Use these to provide context for:
- Why decisions were made
- How the feature fits into the system

⚠️ Do NOT restate documents — reference them only.

---

## Implementation Notes

(Optional)

Include any useful details such as:
- Assumptions made
- Known limitations
- Follow-up considerations

---

## Notes

- Title must be **concise and descriptive**
- Do NOT include:
  - "PR Summary"
  - Phase references
- Description may reference phases by **purpose**, not by number

Example:
✅ "Adds workspace loading and initialization support"

❌ "PR Summary - Phase 2 Implementation"
